fields.Identifying_Data_Chief_Complaint: 33-year-old White female with schizoaffective disorder for medication check.
fields.Subjective: Patient presented appearing well-groomed and cheerful. Reports perfect adherence to brexpiprazole 2 mg daily using morning routine and pill organizer. States feeling wonderful. No hallucinations for six months. No delusional thinking. Sleep excellent at 8 hours nightly. Appetite good, weight stable at 153 lbs. Working full-time as paralegal at small law firm, thriving in career. Mood 'excellent' rated 9/10. Lives independently in apartment. Recently completed 5K race for mental health awareness. Attending therapy monthly for wellness. Four years sober from all substances. Active in recovery community. Planning to pursue law school eventually. No safety concerns, denies SI/HI. (Evaluated by Dr. Michelle Robinson, MD, Psychiatrist)

Mental_Status_Examination.Appearance: Professionally dressed, excellent grooming, bright affect

fields.Diagnostic_Impression: Schizoaffective Disorder, in sustained full remission.
fields.Psychosocial_Context: Living independently; employed as paralegal; four years sober; training for races; considering law school; excellent recovery.
Assessment_and_Plan: Outstanding medication adherence and sustained remission.
Commended on fitness goals and advocacy.
fields.Author: Note written by Dr. Michelle Robinson, MD, Psychiatrist — Legal Professionals Mental Health, 2341 Justice Way, Boston, MA 02115, Phone: (555) 447-8821, Fax: (555) 447-8822
